message.content:
Based on the mobile screenshot of Hayat Life Care, here's a detailed analysis of responsiveness issues:

## 1. Text Truncation
- **Address text**: The address "55 Katha Complex • O.R. Nizam Road" appears to be truncated in the image overlay on the building photo. The full text may not be visible due to limited space in the dark overlay at the bottom of the image.

## 2. Layout Overflow
- **No visible overflow issues** in the current view. All elements appear contained within the viewport.

## 3. Button Sizing
- **Floating action buttons** (chat and message buttons) appear appropriately sized for mobile interaction.
- **Scroll to top button** (up arrow) seems to have adequate dimensions for touch interaction.

## 4. Spacing Problems
- **Section spacing**: The "At A Glance" heading has good vertical spacing from the scroll down indicator above and the building image below.
- **Location section**: The spacing between the location label and address text appears consistent and readable.

## 5. Touch Target Sizes
- **Floating buttons** (chat, message, scroll to top) appear to meet minimum touch target requirements (approximately 48x48px).
- **Navigation menu icon** (hamburger) in the top right seems adequately sized for touch interaction.

## 6. Broken Layouts
- **No broken layouts** visible in the current screenshot.
- The header, hero section, content area, and floating buttons all appear properly aligned and positioned.

## Additional Observations:
- The responsive design appears to be working well on this mobile viewport
- The color contrast between text and backgrounds is sufficient
- The layout maintains proper hierarchy and readability

Overall, the mobile interface shows good responsiveness with no critical issues that would impede usability.
